title: French Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting French-inspired Indian stew made with rich lentils and roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: French Herbs
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh herbs such as parsley, thyme

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato puree and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrot and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the lentils, herbs, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the lentils are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
